titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ وَ عِدَّتِهَا فِي الطَّلَاقِ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – Divorce of the slave girl, and her waiting period regarding the divorce

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ وَ عِدَّتِهَا فِي الطَّلَاقِ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – Divorce of the slave girl, and her waiting period regarding the divorce

segments: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ طَلَاقُ الْعَبْدِ لِلْأَمَةِ تَطْلِيقَتَانِ وَ أَجَلُهَا حَيْضَتَانِ إِنْ كَانَتْ تَحِيضُ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ لَا تَحِيضُ فَأَجَلُهَا شَهْرٌ وَ نِصْفٌ .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ طَلَاقُ الْعَبْدِ لِلْأَمَةِ تَطْلِيقَتَانِ وَ أَجَلُهَا حَيْضَتَانِ إِنْ كَانَتْ تَحِيضُ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ لَا تَحِيضُ فَأَجَلُهَا شَهْرٌ وَ نِصْفٌ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying, ‘Divorce of the slave to the slave girls are two divorces, and her term is of two menstruation if she was menstruation. If she was not menstruating, so her term is a month and a half’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying, ‘Divorce of the slave to the slave girls are two divorces, and her term is of two menstruation if she was menstruation. If she was not menstruating, so her term is a month and a half’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ وَ عِدَّتِهَا فِي الطَّلَاقِ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – Divorce of the slave girl, and her waiting period regarding the divorce

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ فَقَالَ تَطْلِيقَتَانِ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ فَقَالَ تَطْلِيقَتَانِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a divorce of the slave girl, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Two divorces’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a divorce of the slave girl, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Two divorces’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ وَ عِدَّتِهَا فِي الطَّلَاقِ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – Divorce of the slave girl, and her waiting period regarding the divorce

segments: قَالَ عُمَرُ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ مَا تَقُولُونَ يَا أَصْحَابَ مُحَمَّدٍ فِي تَطْلِيقِ الْأَمَةِ فَلَمْ يُجِبْهُ أَحَدٌ فَقَالَ مَا تَقُولُ يَا صَاحِبَ الْبُرْدِ الْمَعَافِرِيِّ يَعْنِي أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ تَطْلِيقَتَانِ .
arabic.text: قَالَ عُمَرُ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ مَا تَقُولُونَ يَا أَصْحَابَ مُحَمَّدٍ فِي تَطْلِيقِ الْأَمَةِ فَلَمْ يُجِبْهُ أَحَدٌ فَقَالَ مَا تَقُولُ يَا صَاحِبَ الْبُرْدِ الْمَعَافِرِيِّ يَعْنِي أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ تَطْلِيقَتَانِ .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abu Asama,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Umar said upon the Pulpit, ‘What are you saying, O companions of Muhammadsaww, regarding a divorce of the slave girl’. So no one answered him. So he said, ‘What are youasws saying, O owner of Al Ma’afarayy cloak?’ – meaning Amir Al-Momineenasws. So heasws gestured by hisasws hand, two divorces’.
en.hubeali.text: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abu Asama, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Umar said upon the Pulpit, ‘What are you saying, O companions of Muhammadsaww, regarding a divorce of the slave girl’. So no one answered him. So he said, ‘What are youasws saying, O owner of Al Ma’afarayy cloak?’ – meaning Amir Al-Momineenasws. So heasws gestured by hisasws hand, two divorces’.

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي أُسَامَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ وَ عِدَّتِهَا فِي الطَّلَاقِ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – Divorce of the slave girl, and her waiting period regarding the divorce

segments: عِدَّةُ الْأَمَةِ حَيْضَتَانِ وَ قَالَ إِذَا لَمْ تَكُنْ تَحِيضُ فَنِصْفُ عِدَّةِ الْحُرَّةِ .
arabic.text: عِدَّةُ الْأَمَةِ حَيْضَتَانِ وَ قَالَ إِذَا لَمْ تَكُنْ تَحِيضُ فَنِصْفُ عِدَّةِ الْحُرَّةِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, and someone else, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Al Qasim Bin Bureyd, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A waiting period of the slave girls is of two menstruations’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When she does not happen to be menstruating, so half a waiting period of the free woman’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, and someone else, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Al Qasim Bin Bureyd, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A waiting period of the slave girls is of two menstruations’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When she does not happen to be menstruating, so half a waiting period of the free woman’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى وَ غَيْرُهُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ فَضَالَةَ بْنِ أَيُّوبَ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ بُرَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْأَمَةِ وَ عِدَّتِهَا فِي الطَّلَاقِ
titles.en: Chapter 76 – Divorce of the slave girl, and her waiting period regarding the divorce

segments: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي أَمَةٍ طَلَّقَهَا زَوْجُهَا تَطْلِيقَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ وَقَعَ عَلَيْهَا فَجَلَدَهُ .
arabic.text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي أَمَةٍ طَلَّقَهَا زَوْجُهَا تَطْلِيقَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ وَقَعَ عَلَيْهَا فَجَلَدَهُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a slave girl whose husband had divorced her with two divorces, then had copulated with her, so he<sup>asws</sup> had him whipped’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a slave girl whose husband had divorced her with two divorces, then had copulated with her, so he<sup>asws</sup> had him whipped’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
